title: Build a tidy data pipeline
description: Reshape data to tidy form and compose dplyr verbs into an inspectable transformation chain.
body: Steps: 1. Define the tidy target: one row per observation, one column per variable. 2. Pivot wide or long with tidyr to reach that shape. 3. Add filter, mutate, group_by, summarise verbs one at a time. 4. Inspect row count and column types after each verb. 5. Ungroup and confirm the final shape and types. Rollback point: keep the raw input frame untouched. Validation: each stage's row count and column classes match the documented expectation.
